name: zutil_zrdr_prealloc_node_pool
description: zUtil::ZRDR_PreallocNodePool lazily creates the ZRDR free-pool list and grows it by the requested node count.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 36 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 12 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies lazy free-pool creation, requested preallocation count, and total/free counter updates.
